$comment: Azoa node — Railway template blueprint. Describes the 3-service topology validated in production (JadeZaher/azoa-autonomous-zones-of-action). Use this as the source of truth when publishing the one-click template via Railway's dashboard 'Create Template from Project' flow, or when standing a node up by hand per deploy/railway/DEPLOY.md.
name: Azoa Node
description: A self-hostable Azoa node: .NET 10 WebAPI backend + Next.js frontend + SurrealDB. Blockchain honesty posture — Algorand real value LIVE; Solana/Wormhole/Ethereum fail-closed and disabled by default.

services.name: surrealdb
services.notes: Provision from the public SurrealDB 3.x template with a /data volume. Its bootstrap credentials are for controlled setup only and must not be injected into the API service.

build.$comment: frontend/Dockerfile installs the published azoa-sdk from npm (frontend/package.json) and builds the Next.js app — no local SDK build step.
